dry_run_payload.texture_prompt: Strict low-poly game-ready Sherman turret kit envelope, target around 1200 generated polygons, cast turret shell with fused mantlet area, main barrel/coax/hatch detail kept simple and readable, detail through PBR normal/albedo not dense geometry, matte olive painted steel and darker gunmetal. Generate lowpoly directly; no high-poly mesh; no decimation artifacts; no melted clay, toy plastic, or text.
